rows.label: tev000291_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah, our dear friend [ST:playername ]. You have
come at a most fortuitous moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0002
rows.name:
This good Ma-non fellow intends to
buy one of our many fine creations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0003
rows.name:
However, he wishes to pay us
not in credits, but in pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0004
rows.name:
We have stressed repeatedly
that we rarely eat pizza, but
he remains quite adamant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0005
rows.name:
We are reminded of your human aphorism
that a nod is as good as a drink
with a blind horse. How true![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0006
rows.name:
It matters naught how good this
frozen pizza is— a barter economy
is not a viable model.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_JNK0010
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: tev000291_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that Lu could sell the pizza to other Ma-non.

rows.label: tev000291_JNK0020
rows.name: Admire

rows.label: tev000291_SEL0021
rows.name: Express admiration at Lu's business acumen.

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0007
rows.name: Hmm. An intriguing proposition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0008
rows.name: That possibility had not occurred to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0009
rows.name:
We are reminded of the time we sold a
small rock found in Nightglow Forest to
a superstitious woman for 3,000 credits.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0010
rows.name:
Very well. We shall sell the pizza at
an elevated price to other Ma-non who
have bought into the pizza fad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0011
rows.name: But... Hold a moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0012
rows.name:
Surely the customer that overpays for the pizza
would come to fiercely regret being taken
advantage of, and later spurn our business.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0013
rows.name:
We mustn't sacrifice potential long-term
profits for a small, short-term gain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0014
rows.name:
No, instead of immediately reselling
these frozen pizzas at a markup...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0015
rows.name:
We should find a way to use our talents
to increase their value, THEN resell
them at an appropriate price![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0016
rows.name:
In other words, we will accept pizzas in lieu of
credits from the Ma-non, upgrade said stock of pizzas,
and then sell them to different Ma-non customers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0017
rows.name:
This could be the beginning of a
beautiful new business model![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0018
rows.name: But wait...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0019
rows.name:
That would be an endless loop of
pizza—one that would leave us without
money for the rest of our days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0020
rows.name: Dear us. Whatever are we to do...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0021
rows.name:
Well, as they say, "When
in Rome, get to roaming."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0022
rows.name:
Mr. Nagi was kind enough to suggest a
book of economics that he believed would
help us with our fledgling business.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0023
rows.name:
He mentioned that it had been written
by the founder of Sakuraba Industries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0024
rows.name:
We found it to be tremendously
interesting—both for learning Earth
history and traditions, as well as economics.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0025
rows.name:
And now that we think back, the book
stressed that one must always prioritize
long-term gains over short-term profits.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0026
rows.name:
We suppose that would include
being willing to accept pizza
as a means of payment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0027
rows.name:
So perhaps we could find a way to
increase the value of the pizza, then
resell it at an appropriate markup?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0028
rows.name:
This could be the beginning of a
beautiful new business model![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000291_MSG0029
rows.name:
We need to begin developing new products at
once, lest we wander this opportunity. We
will continue our conversation another day![ST:wait ]
